title: oncidium millianum
intro: Oncidium millianum, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oncidium millianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
